ADB-DriverLEFT_C1A-HS_HHNv3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DA72F2
Recv ID: 18DAF272
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 7B
Func Name: ADB-L

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "HELLA",
    "soft": "V01.00",
    "version": "1951"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 38456,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Left_ADBDriverFail"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38466,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Left_FANHighBeam-Fail"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 38452,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Left_LEDModule"
  }
]
